name: CardConnect Paradise
description_short: CardConnect Paradise is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.8/5 with 252 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
CardConnect Paradise is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. With 252 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, CardConnect Paradise has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a equipment supplier, CardConnect Paradise provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. CardConnect Paradise operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering CardConnect Paradise should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
